title: Forward Forge Client Reset Packet
description:
This is a mod That adds The Forge Client Reset Packet as forge removed it from all Forge versions past 1.13,Which in turn 
Broke Networks
body:
## What Does this Do

Allows for better server switching when servers are located behind a proxy with mods.

## Warning

This will not work with all mods as some mods may break connecting to vanilla servers, In witch case please use a forced Host from velocity


## How to Use
**1.** Install On Client  
**2.** Launch Game  
**3.** Join Proxy network  
**4.** Switch to Modded server.
## Requirements on the Velocity proxy

[Ambassador](https://modrinth.com/plugin/ambassador)  
  
## INCOMPATABLE MODS  
[Simple Voice Chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)# This may work after recent updates



## NO PLANS TO SUPPORT 1.20.2+ TO MANY NETWORK CHANGES FOR ME TO WANT TO TAKE A CRACK AT IT
